summary: Both ISS-802 concerns are already resolved in the current SEC-2b.7 prose. (1) Causal inference: the old overreach ('endpoint was taken down shortly after this review documented its scoring pathologies') has been replaced with neutral 'whether prompted by our analysis or by an independent API change' framing, plus precise UTC timestamps and a 13-hour removal window. (2) Scoring criterion: 'direction_correct AND snr_sufficient' now cites ISS-705-verification.json as the source of field-name confirmation. No patch required; recommend closing the issue. Supplementary finding documented in expansion: the 2026-04-11 404 appears to be a GitHub Pages routing artifact rather than an editorial removal — the file still exists in the dome main branch and is served at 200 via raw.githubusercontent.com — which strengthens rather than weakens the existing neutral framing.
